Steven Pinker vs. Ross Douthat Debate] Religion is not the way that we're going to get large groups of people to to come together. >> There's no historical evidence to suggest religion is sort of this uniquely tribalizing force. >> Ross, that is totally irrelevant. Cognition was designed to solve problems. >> Wasn't designed. America was founded based on Christianity. America is the greatest country that's ever existed. And it's because of Judeo-Christian values. Religion has a bad rap over the years have a religious way of understanding the world. We're always moving towards some transcendent God. And I think people are looking for God now. Thank you so much for joining us for this things that matter debate from the free press.
